zh.siteSubtitle: 俄罗斯「火星男孩」波力斯卡（1996年生）
zh.homeIntro1: 波力斯卡（Boriska），全名鲍里斯·基普里亚诺维奇（Boris Kipriyanovich），1996年1月11日出生于俄罗斯伏尔加格勒州日尔诺夫斯克市。据他的母亲——一名医生——称，波力斯卡从两岁起就展现出惊人的知识，能够详细讲述火星上的生活、太空旅行和远古地球文明。
zh.homeIntro2: 波力斯卡声称自己曾是火星上的一名飞行员，火星文明因一场核战争而毁灭，幸存者转移到了地下生活。他还提到地球上的利莫里亚（列穆里亚）文明与火星人有联系，而吉萨大狮身人面像的耳后隐藏着改变人类命运的秘密。
zh.homeIntro3: 2004年，俄罗斯《真理报》等媒体报道了波力斯卡的故事，引发全球关注。科学界普遍将其视为伪科学现象，认为这是儿童幻想、父母引导或媒体炒作的结果。尽管如此，火星男孩的叙述因其丰富的细节和跨文化影响力，仍在超自然爱好者群体中广为流传。本站整理了他的主要预言与声明。
zh.coreQuote: 「火星上曾经有一个伟大的文明，但他们因为一场核战争而毁灭了。幸存者搬到了地下。地球也面临同样的危险。」
keyPointsList: 1996年 —— 波力斯卡出生于俄罗斯伏尔加格勒州
2004年 —— 俄罗斯《真理报》首次报道「火星男孩」，引发国际关注
2007-2008年 —— Project Camelot 对波力斯卡进行专访，视频在互联网广泛传播
2009年 —— 波力斯卡预言的「地球灾难年」
2013年 —— 波力斯卡预言的另一个「灾难节点」
sourceList: 预言内容整理自 Project Camelot 采访视频及文字记录（Wayback Machine 存档）
早期报道来源：俄罗斯《真理报》英文版报道（Pravda.ru）
验证评价基于公开新闻报道、考古学共识和科学文献
编者观点不代表学术定论，科学界普遍将此类声称归为伪科学
站点图标采用火星符号——波力斯卡的核心叙事围绕火星文明展开，红色星球是其最具辨识度的视觉标志

en.homeIntro1: Boriska, full name Boris Kipriyanovich, was born on January 11, 1996, in Zhirnovsk, Volgograd Oblast, Russia. According to his mother, a physician, Boriska began demonstrating remarkable knowledge from age two, describing in detail life on Mars, space travel, and ancient Earth civilizations.
en.homeIntro2: Boriska claims he was once a pilot on Mars, where a great civilization was destroyed by nuclear war, with survivors retreating underground. He also spoke of Earth's Lemurian civilization having connections to Martians, and claimed that a secret capable of changing humanity's destiny is hidden behind the ear of the Great Sphinx of Giza.
en.homeIntro3: In 2004, Russian newspaper Pravda and other media outlets reported Boriska's story, sparking worldwide attention. The scientific community widely regards his claims as pseudoscience, attributing them to childhood fantasy, parental influence, or media sensationalism. Nonetheless, the Mars Boy's narratives remain popular among paranormal enthusiasts due to their rich detail and cross-cultural appeal. This site compiles his major predictions and claims.
en.coreQuote: "There was once a great civilization on Mars, but they destroyed themselves in a nuclear war. The survivors moved underground. Earth faces the same danger."
keyPointsList: 1996 —— Boriska born in Volgograd Oblast, Russia
2004 —— Russian Pravda first reports on 'Mars Boy', sparking international interest
2007-2008 —— Project Camelot interviews Boriska, videos spread widely online
2009 —— Year of 'Earth catastrophe' predicted by Boriska
sourceList: Prophecies compiled from Project Camelot interview videos and transcripts (Wayback Machine archive)
Early coverage: Russian Pravda English edition (Pravda.ru)
Verification based on public news reports, archaeological consensus, and scientific literature
Editorial opinions do not represent academic consensus; the scientific community generally classifies such claims as pseudoscience
Site icon: Mars symbol — Boriska's core narrative revolves around Martian civilization, making the red planet his most recognizable visual motif
